header_title.description: Maqaa appii kan mata duree irratti mul'atu. Appii barbaacha meeshalee nyaataa addunyaaaf.

header_subtitle.description: Jecha haala appii maqaa jala mata duree irratti mul'atu.

home_page_hero_title.description: Mata duree guddaa kutaa hero fuula jalqabaa irratti.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Meeshalee dhugaa maddi isaanii kichuuwwan addunyaa irraa ilaali
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Jecha mata duree jala kutaa hero fuula jalqabaa irratti mul'atu.

home_page_featured_title.description: Mata duree kutaa meeshalee nyaataa kaardii olitti mul'atu.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Yeroo bilcheessuu kaardii meeshalee nyaataa irratti. {minutes} bakka daqiiqaa lakkoofsatti ni jijjiirama.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Barreeffama duratti sadarkaa rakkina kaardii meeshalee nyaataa irratti mul'atu.

recipe_card_easy.description: Sadarkaa rakkina meeshalee nyaataa salphaa agarsiisu.

recipe_card_medium.description: Sadarkaa rakkina meeshalee nyaataa giddugaleessa agarsiisu.

recipe_card_hard.description: Sadarkaa rakkina meeshalee nyaataa cimaa agarsiisu.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Shorba harree laafaa fi chashu laafaa, uumaa butu, fi noodles haaraa.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pizza Neapolitan durii kan nyaata San Marzano, mozzarella haaraa, fi basil.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos harree marinate godhame kan ananas, cilantro, fi qoonqoo irratti tortilla qamadii.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Kukkuu laafaa meesha zayitii fi tomaatota dhandhama qabu waliin qophaa'e.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Noodles midhaan shurubaa, tofu, boolla, fi shubbisa tamarind waliin bilcheessu.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes laaffaa fi bareedaa kan Nutella, qamadii haaraa, fi akaakuu korma wajjin guutame.

locale_switcher_label.description: Barreeffama afaan jijjiiruu filannoo header keessatti argamuuf.

locale_switcher_en.description: Filannoo afaan Ingiliizii afaan jijjiiruu keessatti.

locale_switcher_ja.description: Filannoo afaan Jaappaanii afaan jijjiiruu keessatti.

locale_switcher_es.description: Filannoo afaan Ispeenishii afaan jijjiiruu keessatti.
